rulings.Case Title: JOHN D. HOLLOMAN MD VS. MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION For Peremptory Writ Of Mandamus
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, JUNE 23, 2008 LINE 9. PETITIONER JOHN HOLLOMAN'S MOTION For Peremptory Writ Of Mandamus IS CONTINUED TO JULY 15, 2008. THE COURT REQUIRES THAT THE MOVING PARTY IS TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH A SET OF COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR PAPERS. WHEN SUBMITTING THE DUPLICATE COPIES, PLEASE PROVIDE A COVER LETTER TO THE COURT REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE SO THAT THE COURTESY COPIES WON'T BE MISPLACED WHEN RECEIVED. =(302/PHA)
